page_content:
KNES289 Topical Investigations (1-6 Credits)

Independent study by an individual student or a group of students in special areas of knowledge not covered by regularly scheduled courses. Repeatable to: 6 credits.

KNES293 History of Sport in America (3 Credits)

The growth and development of sport in America. The transformation of sport within the perspective of American history, including class sport, professionalization, amateurism, and international involvement.
